title: Claim Lineage
essence: Immutable audit trail tracking the provenance and evolution of AI claims and reasoning
steps: Create immutable claim registry with cryptographic hashes
Track reasoning chain with parent-child relationships
Implement claim versioning and modification history
Add provenance metadata for each claim
Enable backward tracing of final conclusions
tradeoffs: Storage overhead for complete claim history

evidence.notes: Essential for AI accountability and debugging complex reasoning chains
